blended.narrative: Ragged Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 51°F.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
